docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CELIS, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
